Status Criteria

SLOWED

vs Last CI Run: abs cycle diff > 1000 and rel cycle diff > 5%

vs 14-Day Trend: abs diff with median > 1000 and Modified Z-score > 2.0

If nothing is regressed and one criterion is slowed, the final status becomes SLOWED.

REGRESSED

vs Last CI Run: abs cycle diff > 1000 and rel cycle diff > 10%

vs 14-Day Trend: abs diff with median > 1000 and Modified Z-score > 3.0

If either criterion is regressed, the final status becomes REGRESSED.

Passed / Not Available: if at least one available criterion is Passed and none are Regressed/Slowed, the case is marked Passed. If both criteria are unavailable, it stays Not Available.

Example: vs Last CI Run = +12.0% (Regressed) and Modified Z-score = +1.4 (Passed) → final status is still Regressed.
